invoices.notes: Monthly wall rental, care visit bundle and DF Pro dashboard access.
Monthly rental and plant care service for clinic reception wall.
Renewal-risk account. Payment confirmation should be linked to save plan evidence.
Monthly care service and ambience assurance for clubhouse wall.
Optional second-wall concept deposit for account expansion scenario.

policies.label: Recurring rental cadence
policies.rule: Issue on the 1st working day; route unresolved balances to the account owner before proof-pack handoff.

policies.label: Overdue escalation
policies.rule: Three-day overdue invoices enter save-plan review when the account is also renewal-risk or SLA-risk.

policies.label: Report evidence link
policies.rule: Paid status, proof readiness and service closure are all visible in client report metrics.
